"title": "Big Apple Kickball - Tuesday - Open Division - Spring 2026",

webhook_payload.body_html:
TUESDAY KICKBALL

Open Division (Advanced)


LEAGUE DETAILS:

  • Level of Play: Advanced

  • Team Assignment: Randomized Teams

  • Opening Party: March 31, 2026

  • Season Dates: April 14, 2026 – June 2, 2026 (8 weeks)

    • Day/Time: Tuesdays 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM (1 game per night, 45 min per game)

  • Closing Party (tentative, pending Rain Date): June 9, 2026

  • Rain Date: June 9, 2026

  • Location: Chelsea Park (27th St & 9th Ave)

  • Price: $115


REGISTRATION DATES/TIMES:

  • Vet Registration: March 11, 2026 7:00 PM
    (Vet status is earned by missing no more than the greater of 25% or 2 weeks of the Tuesday Fall 2025 of that sport/day/division. Vet status cannot be transferred between players or between different sports/days. All players who are eligible to register during the Veteran Registration period will be notified in advance by email.)

  • WTNB+ & BIPOC Early Registration: March 12, 2026 7:00 PM

  • Open Registration: March 13, 2026 7:00 PM

  • **Notes**:
    • You will only be able to add the product to your cart on the corresponding dates and times above
    • Registration takes place entirely online - please don't show up to the location in person when trying to register (you don't need to!)

By participating in any sport or event operated by BARS, players agree to the following:

  • Waiver
  • Terms of Participation
  • Player Participation Policies
  • Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) Policy
  • Harassment, Bullying, and Discrimination Policy

Have questions? Email kickball.tuesday@bigapplerecsports.com

"title": "Big Apple Kickball - Sunday - Open Division - Spring 2026",

webhook_payload.body_html:
SUNDAY KICKBALL

 

Open Division (Social)


 

LEAGUE DETAILS:

  • Level of Play: Social

    • *While matches will be scored and season standings recorded, this league will stress the social aspect of the sport over competitiveness.

  • Team Assignment: Sign-up with a buddy (randomized otherwise)

  • Newbie Orientation/Open Play/Opening Party: March 22, 2026

  • Season Dates: March 29 – May 17 (8 weeks, off May 24)

    • Day/Time: Sundays 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM (1 game per night, 45 min per game)

    • Note: The first week of games (March 29), games will be from 4:00 - 6:00 PM instead of 8-10 PM

  • Closing Party (tentative, pending Rain Date): May 31

  • Rain Date: June 7

  • Location: DeWitt Clinton Park (52nd St & 11th Ave)

  • Price: $115


 

REGISTRATION DATES/TIMES:

  • Vet Registration: March 4 at 7:00 PM 
    (Vet status is earned by missing no more than the greater of 25% or 2 weeks of the Sunday Open Fall 2025 of that sport/day/division. Vet status cannot be transferred between players or between different sports/days. All players who are eligible to register during the Veteran Registration period will be notified in advance by email.)

  • WTNB+ & BIPOC Early Registration: March 5 at 7:00 PM

  • Open Registration: March 6 at 7:00 PM

  • **Notes**:
    • You will only be able to add the product to your cart on the corresponding dates and times above
    • Registration takes place entirely online - please don't show up to the location in person when trying to register (you don't need to!)

By participating in any sport or event operated by BARS, players agree to the following:

  • Waiver
  • Terms of Participation
  • Player Participation Policies
  • Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) Policy
  • Harassment, Bullying, and Discrimination Policy

Have questions? Email kickball.sunday@bigapplerecsports.com
